title: Field Subsetting in DB2
text: Field Subsetting in DB2 Fields that are not painted on the Uniface form and are not explicitly mentioned in ProcScript, are not selected, fetched, inserted, or updated by the DBMS connector. The Uniface kernel determines which fields are required (or not) depending on the Field List property of the component entity. Note: To force your application to retrieve all fields of a component entity, you must change the Field List property to All fields . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
